title: Leather Recycling
description: Recycle armor, item frames and more into leather and rabbit hide.
body:
Recycle leather armor into leather, and item frames into rabbit hide. This pack also adds recipes for smelting rotten flesh into leather and deconstructing leather into rabbit hide. For Minecraft versions 1.20-1.21.1, the pack includes the bundle recipe introduced in 1.21.2.

### Recycles to leather
- Leather helmet
- Leather chestplate
- Leather leggings
- Leather boots
- Leather horse armor
- Saddle
- Bundle (four bundles get you three leather)

### Recycles to rabbit hide
- Item frame
- Glow item frame
- Book
- Enchanted book

### notblue's recycling packs
- [Better Gold Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-gold-recycling)
- [Better Iron Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-iron-recycling)
- [Copper Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-recycling)
- [Diamond Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/diamond-recycling)
- [Netherite Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/netherite-recycling)
